{{Quote|You know he flew with the Corellian Security Forces, right? He is a bonafide ace!|[[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:LFW" />}}
'''Dartas Pytin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ace/Legends|ace]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Dartas is as tough as the Scarlet Dawn, m'friend. Iffin' ya thought the Bright Jewel was hard, wait til ya see what Dartas has t'offer ya.|[[Aleas Rans'ery]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:LFW" />}}
In his early career, Dartas Pytin was a pilot in the [[Corellian Security Force]].<ref name="SWG:LFW" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was a well-trained pilot for the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] based on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], along with [[Serissu]], [[Laetin A'shera]] and [[Aleas Rans'ery]].<ref name="SWG:PM" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> he oversaw all Car'das operations in the [[Scarlet Dawn]] quadrant of the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:PM" />

During the [[Battle of Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Battle of Tansarii Point Station]] between Car'das and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] forces, Dartas Pytin tasked his pilots to eliminate several Black Sun spies in order to prevent the spread of the [[Black Envy]] [[Computer virus/Legends|computer virus]].<ref name="SWG:PM" /> Pytin later led the final assault against the Black Sun strongholds known as the [[Salient Trinity]]. He first ordered his pilots to attack the [[Dual Moons]], eliminate Black Sun pilots and kill [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commanders]] [[Chaen]] and [[Ondara]].<ref name="SWG:AtT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|After the Trinity|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> Dartas Pytin's pilots finally assaulted the [[Darkveil Eclipse]] and his defenses led by Lieutenant Commander [[Rilis]]. The pilots were successful and thus annihilated the main Black Sun hubs in the Bright Jewel system. Pytin's pilots later joined other Car'das pilots to eliminate remaining Black Sun forces in the area, formally ending the Battle of Tansarii Point Station.<ref name="SWG:DE">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Darkveil Eclipse|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Dartas Pytin appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:PM" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Dartas Pytin was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:PM" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
